3049190.name: Managate
3049190.description:
Survive against waves of monstrous foes in this side-scrolling action RPG where strategy and spellcraft are one. Unleash devastating magic to survive the onslaught, then use the calm between sieges to capture the very creatures that attack you. Bend elves, orcs, and goblins to your will, turning them into a living, automated defense. Forge game breaking spells, command a legion of minions, and build a fortress powered by your might.

Capture and Command - Capture elves and goblins to join your ranks, each offering unique abilities to fortify your defences and automate resource collection. Turn your growing legion into a self sufficient war machine, gathering materials and manning the walls while you focus on what matters, unlocking catastrophic new spells.

Survive the Onslaught - Take control of your defences to fend off relentless attacks from griffins, dragons, goblins, and other fantastical creatures. From fire breathing Dragons to legions of the undead, each wave presents a new tactical puzzle to solve with your evolving arsenal of spells and allies.

Unlock Upgrades and New Spells - Use the resources you gather to fund research and upgrades. Find and combine spell effects to create overpowered spells that will obliterate your enemies. Enhance your spells, and capture new allies to give you the best chance of survival. Automate and upgrade to create the perfect defence strategy.

The darkness gathers. Your mana crackles with anticipation. Will you be overwhelmed by the tide, or will you create a new fate from power and strategy?
3049190.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
